The '''First Battle of Zonama Sekot''' was a protracted siege against the living [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], whom the [[Ferroan]] and [[Langhesi]] settlers on Zonama termed "Far Outsiders."

==Background==
The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] had been traveling through [[Intergalactic Void|deep space]] ever since their [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|home galaxy]] had been destroyed and had slowly began to [[Praetorite Vong|establish themselves]] on the edge of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. When they discovered Zonama Sekot, they deemed it similar to their own living [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], [[Yuuzhan'tar]].

However, when the Praetorite Vong attempted to settle on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], Zonama Sekot's biosphere killed off the Vong flora and fauna, provoking outrage from them. Although Sekot attempted to negotiate with them, they began an assault upon the planet.

==The battle==
After several years, the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] received word of the attack, and sent [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Vergere]] to investigate. When she arrived, she discovered the true nature of the Far Outsiders–who considered her powers amazing.

Concealing her [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] identity, Vergere managed to get the Praetorite Vong to agree to halt their attack on Zonama Sekot, in exchange for traveling with the Yuuzhan Yong. Both Vergere and the Far-Outsiders retreated back into the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].

==Aftermath==
The damage done to Sekot was immense, especially on the planet's southern hemisphere, where huge gashes were still apparent six decades later.
